_comment: Anamnesis — self-organizing memory proxy. Works with any OpenAI-compatible backend.

_presets._note: Swap baseUrl + apiKey for your backend:

custom-passthrough._note: Empty apiKey lets the client's own Authorization header pass through to upstream unchanged.

upstream._disableThinkingNote: Injects chat_template_kwargs:{enable_thinking:false} — prevents Qwen3 thinking tokens from eating context/time

_modelGuide.gemma3:1b: 0.8GB — fastest, good enough for simple fact extraction
_modelGuide.qwen2.5:0.5b: 0.4GB — smallest, use if VRAM is tight
_modelGuide.qwen3:0.6b: 0.5GB — fast, clean JSON via /api/chat think:false, ~140 t/s

context._note: v0.7 virtual context: the window is DISCOVERED from the upstream (/props) and tokens are counted with the upstream tokenizer. tokenBudget is no longer a budget — it survives only as the discovery hint used when the upstream exposes neither /props nor a tokenize endpoint.
context._tokenBudgetNote: legacy alias of nCtxHint — kept so old configs keep working
context._completionReserveNote: tokens held back for the model's reply (+ thinking overhead)
context._watermarksNote: fractions of n_ctx: start compacting at 70%, signal pressure at 85%, emergency-trim at 95%
context._pinnedExchangesNote: most-recent exchanges (tool-call + results = one exchange) always kept verbatim
context._memoryRefreshTurnsNote: rebuild the <recall-context> block every N requests — keeps the prompt prefix byte-stable in between so llama.cpp prompt caching hits
context._charsPerTokenNote: fallback estimator only; self-tunes from usage.prompt_tokens ground truth

artifacts._spillTokensNote: tool results at or above this size are archived to the artifact store and represented by a recall() handle once evicted
artifacts._recallToolNote: inject the recall tool into agentic requests (clients that send a tools array); the proxy resolves recall calls itself — clients never see them

elastic._note: when the upstream advertises resizable:true in /props (the Pleiades engine does), sustained pressure POSTs /resize to double n_ctx — adaptive context, no restart, no config
elastic._maxNCtxNote: 0 = trust the engine's own ceiling (its hardware planner / model training limit)

foresight._note: Future-intention extractor. Runs in parallel with memcell extraction.

persona._note: Character profile management — auto-detects OpenClaw SOUL.md, or use file/inline for other setups.

source._typeNote: auto | openclaw | file | inline. 'auto' tries openclaw paths, then file, then inline.

openclaw._note: Path to SOUL.md. Used in 'openclaw' mode and as the first candidate in 'auto' mode.

file._note: Custom character definition file for non-OpenClaw setups.

inline._note: Paste character definition directly here if not using a file.

drift._checkNote: Run a drift check every N assistant turns per session.
drift._thresholdNote: Consistency score below this triggers a drift reminder. 0=always remind, 1=never.

evolution._consolidateNote: After this many pending growth observations, run LLM consolidation.

injection._note: Max characters for the <character> block (not counting evolution/drift lines).
